suggestions.title: Add deployment concurrency guard per environment
suggestions.recommendation: Add a concurrency block such as group cd-app-${{ inputs.environment }} to prevent concurrent deployments to the same environment.

suggestions.title: Pin GitHub Actions to commit SHAs for supply-chain hardening
suggestions.recommendation: Replace floating action tags with pinned commit SHAs for actions/checkout, actions/setup-python, azure/login, azure/functions-action, and azure/cli.
